prompt: A minimalist monochrome fantasy portrait on a flat light gray background, centered with lots of empty negative space around the subject. Show a bust-length hooded rogue or medieval assassin facing slightly to the right, rendered as a high-contrast black ink illustration with dense stippling, scratchy engraving-like texture, and dramatic white highlights on the folds of the cloth. The figure wears a deep cowl and heavy hood that completely obscure the head and most of the face, plus a layered scarf wrapped around the neck and a single worn metal shoulder pauldron on the right side with visible rivets, scratches, and a leather strap crossing the chest. Replace the visible face area with a single vertical soft-edged blurred rectangle in gray-black tones, creating an intentional censored or glitched void where the face should be. Keep the composition simple: 1 character, 1 shoulder pauldron, 1 blurred rectangular face block, no additional props, no scenery, no text. Style it like a dark fantasy woodcut or vintage pen-and-ink print, isolated emblem-like portrait, stark black on pale gray.
